title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE KALINGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВҖВ“ SALEGSEG ANNEX IN BARANGAY SALEGSEG, MUNICIPALITY OF BALBALAN, PROVINCE OF KALINGA FROM THE KALINGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS BALBALAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 766; 112 OG No. 7, 737 (February 15, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10718, December 29, 2015 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE KALINGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВҖВ“ SALEGSEG ANNEX IN BARANGAY SALEGSEG, MUNICIPALITY OF BALBALAN, PROVINCE OF KALINGA FROM THE KALINGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS BALBALAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

ГўВҖВ“ The Kalinga National High School ГўВҖВ“ Salegseg Annex in Barangay Salegseg, Municipality of Balbalan, Province of Kalinga is hereby separated from the Kalinga National High School and converted into an independent national high school to be known as Balbalan National High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

ГўВҖВ“ All personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Kalinga National High SchoolГўВҖВ“Salegseg Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the Balbalan National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

ГўВҖВ“ The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the DepartmentГўВҖВҷs program the operationalization of the Balbalan National High School, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current yearГўВҖВҷs appropriation of the Kalinga National High SchoolГўВҖВ“Salegseg Annex. Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

ГўВҖВ“ The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations that may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

ГўВҖВ“ This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representative and the Senate on May 19, 2014 and October 6, 2015, respectively.

(SGD.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: DEC 29 2015

(SGD.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
